skipped.message: Could not drive any object to status='destroyed' via live model in 3-4 turns.

testcase.name: test_prose_state_contradiction_correction

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: new_story failed: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_gateway_live_probe.py:112: in session info = _new_session(api_client) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_gateway_live_probe.py:44: in _new_session assert r.status_code == 200, f"new_story failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: new_story failed: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
